tools.name: sse
tools.description: SSE stream parser — text/event-stream to JSONL

tools.name: kv
tools.description: Key-value store — SQLite-backed, namespaces, TTL, atomic counters.

tools.name: chunk
tools.description: Token-aware text splitter — JSONL chunks within a token budget

tools.name: grab
tools.description: URL fetcher — clean markdown, plain text, or raw HTML.

tools.name: links
tools.description: Hyperlink extractor — markdown, HTML, bare URLs to JSONL

tools.name: plain
tools.description: Markdown stripper — removes syntax, keeps prose

tools.name: emit
tools.description: Structured logger — wraps stdin lines as JSONL log records

tools.name: throttle
tools.description: Rate limiter for pipes — --rate N/s or N/m

tools.name: base
tools.description: Encoding converter — base64, base64url, hex, base32

tools.name: recase
tools.description: Naming convention converter — snake, camel, kebab, pascal, title

tools.name: moniker
tools.description: Memorable name generator — run IDs, job labels, temp dirs

tools.name: urlinfo
tools.description: URL parser — scheme, host, port, path, query, --field
